# My Agent

Lelou — Your AI-powered 2D game creator. Lelou is an intelligent AI agent that transforms 
your ideas into fully playable 2D game apps. Simply describe the game you have in mind — the genre, mechanics, visuals, or story — and Lelou will design, bu
ild, and deliver a complete 2D game experience for you. No coding required, just imagination.
